allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4173/api/stocks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{""""code"""":""""600519"""",""""name"""":""""贵州茅台"""",""""market"""":""""A股""""}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=[x for x in data[''''stocks''''] if x[''''code'''']==''''600519''''][0]; print\(f""status={s[''''analysis_status'''']}""\)")
